metadata.description: Mikael Lund's collection of Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: scientific-writing
plugins.description: Write and revise clear, concise, reader-focused scientific prose, combining Nature Masterclasses, Strunk & White, and The Economist Style Guide.

plugins.name: faunus
plugins.description: Author Faunus YAML input files and build, run, profile, and debug Faunus molecular simulations.

plugins.name: scientific-plotting
plugins.description: Design, create, and review plots and data visualizations for scientific journals, from chart choice and faithful encoding to journal artwork specs.
